description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a curved detachable box magazine, and a metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a prominent red dot sight mounted on top, enhancing its aiming capabilities for urban engagements. The barrel is standard length and ends with a simple front sight post, with no visible muzzle device attached. The receiver and magazine are finished in a dark metallic color, contrasting with the warm brown wood of the stock and handguard. The trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible, indicating standard ergonomic controls. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use in a variety of urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, curved magazine, and a mounted red dot sight. The metallic receiver and barrel contrast with the brown wood, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and mounted red dot sight.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the barrel's end, front sight post, and the alignment of the red dot sight above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the other side of the receiver and magazine, with the sight system visible on top.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the sight system along the rifle's axis.
